name: Phase 1: Validate app_ui.py on save
description: When app_ui.py is saved, verify Flask routes, planner singleton pattern, response shapes, and that debug mode is off.

action.message:
The file phase-1-agentic-navigation-planner/app_ui.py was just saved. Please review it and verify:
1. app.run() uses debug=False.
2. get_planner() uses hasattr caching — the agent is NOT recreated on every request.
3. POST /api/plan returns 400 if prompt is missing or empty.
4. POST /api/execute returns 400 if plan is missing or has no steps.
5. The execute results summary contains only: step (int), action (str), seconds (float|null), ok (bool) — no raw tool output strings.
6. The Flask static_folder points to BASE_DIR.parent / 'assets' and static_url_path is '/assets'.
7. All error responses use the shape {'error': '...'} with an appropriate HTTP status code.
Report any violations found.
